metadata.description: Cross-project Claude Code plugins for LaFollett Labs — session management, issue tracking, and developer workflow tools

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: PE-powered code reviews with three-pass protocol (Architecture → Quality+Tests → Security) and project bootstrapping via init-project

plugins.name: context-handoff
plugins.description: Session state handoff, resume, and context usage monitoring — save working context to JSON, resume in fresh sessions, and get automatic warnings as context fills up

plugins.name: issue-manager
plugins.description: GitHub Issue management with intent-over-implementation templates — Epics, Stories, Tasks, Bugs with quality gates and CLI automation

plugins.name: session-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze and extract conversations from Claude Code session JSONL files — transcripts, token stats, tool usage, and session discovery

plugins.name: ux-designer
plugins.description: UX design harness — structured discovery, prototype generation, visual iteration via Playwright, Storybook support, parallel variations via worktrees
